questions.question: Describe the primary advantages of using Hadoop over traditional relational databases (RDBMS) for large-scale data processing. (5 marks)
Explain the process of data processing in Hadoop, highlighting the role of MapReduce in this process. (10 marks)
What is the main difference between HDFS (Hadoop Distributed File System) and local file systems? Provide an example of when you would use each. (8 marks)
